title: Lead Instructional Designer at British Council India

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at British Council India
jsonLd.description:
Join the British Council India family as a Instructional Designer in Tiruchirappalli. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About British Council India:
British Council India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with British Council India!
